nodes.name: Masked tityra
nodes.summary: Masked tityra（Masked tityra，学名 Tityra semifasciata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于徐畢克斯、圭亚那 (地区)、哥倫比亞東部山脈。

nodes.name: 徐畢克斯
nodes.summary: 徐畢克斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括白腹拟䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Scarlet-horned manakin等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 哥倫比亞東部山脈
nodes.summary: 哥倫比亞東部山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联28种鸟类，包括Pinnated bittern、髯蜂鸟、Flame-winged parakeet等28种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 圭亚那 (地区)
nodes.summary: 圭亚那 (地区)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联92种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、Black curassow、纯色秧鸡等92种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The masked tityra (Tityra semifasciata) is a medium-sized passerine bird. It is found in Mexico, every Central American country, and every northern and central mainland South American country except the Guianas.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

It is found in Mexico, every Central American country, and every northern and central mainland South American country except the Guianas.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: fortis: east slope of Colombia's Eastern Andes and south through eastern Ecuador, and eastern Peru into northern and eastern Bolivia and east into Brazil's Amazonas Some sources include Trinidad and French Guiana in the species' range but the South American Classification Committee has no records in either country. The masked tityra inhabits a variety of forested landscapes in the tropical and lower subtropical zones, most of which are somewhat open
